The stolen data includes physical addresses, email addresses, phone numbers, company names and may contain other compromised user details. This data is being shared on the internet.
site_description: The affected entities are various manufacturing and production businesses located in the Chelyabinsk Oblast region of Russia, spanning industries including agriculture, light industry, forestry, machinery, metallurgy, and food production.

title: Russian Citizen PII Data
description: On an unknown date, personally identifiable information (PII) allegedly belonging to individuals based in Russia was leaked online. The stolen data includes full names, email addresses, phone numbers and may contain other compromised user details. This breach is being publicly shared on Telegram.
site_description: Russia is a country located in Eastern Europe and Northern Asia.

title: Adidas Extranet
description: On an unknown date, data reported to belong to an Adidas extranet, whose headquarters are located in Germany, was exfiltrated. The stolen data includes company names, API tokens, physical addresses, phone numbers, passwords, birth dates, usernames, IP addresses, full names, email addresses and may contain other compromised user details. This breach is being publicly shared on BreachForums, an online cybercriminal forum, and Telegram.
site_description: Adidas is a multinational apparel and footwear company headquartered in Germany.

title: Vivo Brazil Customer Credentials
description: Between 2023 and 2026, credential data reported to belong to Vivo Brazil customers was compiled from infostealer malware logs. Vivo is a telecommunications company headquartered in Brazil. The stolen data includes national IDs, phone numbers, email addresses and may contain other compromised user details. This breach is being privately shared on the internet.
site_description: Vivo is a telecommunications company located in Brazil.

title: Telekom Serbia

The stolen data includes phone numbers, company names, physical addresses, email addresses, full names, national IDs and may contain other compromised user details. This breach is being privately shared on DarkForums, an online cybercriminal forum.
site_description: Telekom Serbia is a telecommunications company located in Serbia.

title: Nigerian Government Agricultural/Youth Empowerment Program

site_description: The International Foundation for Art Research (IFAR) is a nonprofit research organization focused on art authentication and provenance research, located in the United States.
